Statute.Title: National School Food Program Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Programme national d’alimentation scolaire, Loi sur le)

ReviewReport.Text: Report and tabling in each house of parliament, s. 8

CIF.Text: CIF, 2026, c. 3, s. 599, enacting ss. 1 to 8 of the National School Food Program Act in force on assent 26.03.2026
